title: Patau's syndrome - NHS
text:
your child has Patau's syndrome, your clinical team will pass information about him or her on to the National Congenital Anomaly and Rare Disease Registration Service (NCARDRS).
This helps scientists look for better ways to prevent and treat this condition. You can opt out of the register at any time.
Find out more about the National Congenital Anomaly and Rare Disease Registration Service on GOV.UK 
Further information and support 
These organisations are useful further sources of information about Patau's syndrome.
They can also provide advice and support:
Contact Genetic Alliance UK Support Organisation for Trisomy 13/18 (SOFT UK) 
Page last reviewed: 18 July 2023
Next review due: 18 July 2026
